data.name: grdHopDong.BuiltInTextsData
data.value: <LocalizableData ID="LocalizableStrings" Collection="true"><GroupByBoxInfo>Kéo tiêu đề cột vào đây để nhóm theo cột</GroupByBoxInfo><EmptyGridInfo>Không có hợp đồng nào trong đơn vị này</EmptyGridInfo></LocalizableData>

data.value: <GridEXLayoutData><RootTable><Columns Collection="true" ElementName="Column"><Column0 ID="ID"><AllowSize>False</AllowSize><Caption>ID</Caption><DataMember>ID</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><Key>ID</Key><Position>0</Position><Visible>False</Visible></Column0><Column1 ID="btnMenu"><ButtonDisplayMode>Always</ButtonDisplayMode><AllowDrag>False</AllowDrag><AllowRemove>False</AllowRemove><AllowSize>False</AllowSize><ButtonText>...</ButtonText><ButtonStyle>TextButton</ButtonStyle><DataMember>btnMenu</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><FilterEditType>NoEdit</FilterEditType><Key>btnMenu</Key><Position>1</Position><Width>21</Width></Column1><Column2 ID="ThonID"><AllowSize>False</AllowSize><Caption>Thôn</Caption><DataMember>ThonID</DataMember><EditType>MultiColumnDropDown</EditType><Key>ThonID</Key><Position>4</Position><DropDownIndex>0</DropDownIndex></Column4><Column5 ID="NgaySinh"><AllowSize>False</AllowSize><Caption>Ngày 9.75pt</Font></RowFormatStyle><HeaderFormatStyle><FontBold>True</FontBold></HeaderFormatStyle><RowHeaderFormatStyle><FontBold>True</FontBold></RowHeaderFormatStyle><NewRowFormatStyle><BackColor>LightBlue</BackColor><Font>Arial, data.name: gridEXDangKyDauTu_DesignTimeLayout.LayoutString
data.value: <GridEXLayoutData><RootTable><Columns Collection="true" ElementName="Column"><Column0 ID="ID"><Caption>ID</Caption><DataMember>ID</DataMember><Key>ID</Key><Position>0</Position><Visible>False</Visible></Column0><Column1 ID="DanhMucDauTuID"><CompareTarget>Text</CompareTarget><Caption>Danh mục đầu tư</Caption><DataMember>DanhMucDauTuID</DataMember><DefaultGroupInterval>Text</DefaultGroupInterval><EditType>MultiColumnCombo</EditType><Key>DanhMucDauTuID</Key><Position>1</Position><DropDownIndex>0</DropDownIndex></Column1><Column2 ID="MucDichVay"><Caption>Mục đích vay</Caption><DataMember>MucDichVay</DataMember><Key>MucDichVay</Key><Position>2</Position></Column2><Column3 ID="SoLuongDangKy"><Caption>Số lượng</Caption><DataMember>SoLuongDangKy</DataMember><Key>SoLuongDangKy</Key><Position>3</Position></Column3><Column4 ID="DonGia"><Caption>Đơn giá</Caption><DataMember>DonGia</DataMember><Key>DonGia</Key><Position>4</Position></Column4><Column5 ID="SoTien"><Caption>Số tiền</Caption><DataMember>SoTien</DataMember><Key>SoTien</Key><Position>5</Position></Column5><Column6 ID="ThoiGianThucHien"><Caption>Thời gian thực hiện</Caption><DataMember>ThoiGianThucHien</DataMember><Key>ThoiGianThucHien</Key><Position>6</Position></Column6><Column7 ID="GhiChu"><Caption>Ghi chú</Caption><DataMember>GhiChu</DataMember><Key>GhiChu</Key><Position>7</Position></Column7></Columns><GroupCondition /></RootTable><DropDowns Collection="true" ElementName="DropDown"><DropDown0
